_meta.description: Dome model predictions that actually failed, regardless of how the dome categorizes them. The dome uses soft language — 'refined', 'suspended', 'pending' — to avoid calling failures failures. This file tracks what the data actually showed. Our FAIL-NNN IDs are stable; the dome may reuse, rename, or remove their references.

placeholders.{{DOME_CLAIMED_FAILURES}}: The dome's own stated failure count
placeholders.{{DOME_CLAIMED_ACCURACY}}: The dome's own stated accuracy string

entries.prediction: Polaris elevation at various latitudes would exceed WGS84 latitude by specific amounts (e.g., +0.27°)
entries.outcome: Falsified by dome's own OPEN-006 data showing altitude excesses of +0.32° to +1.29° — contradicting the predicted +0.27°

entries.summary: Schumann resonance elevation during G3+ storms
entries.prediction: G3+ geomagnetic storms elevate Schumann resonance amplitude
entries.outcome: March 2026 G3 storm showed 35% suppression — the opposite of the prediction
entries.what_actually_happened: Prediction failed. Dome replaced it with the opposite claim (PRED-SR-SUPPRESS) borrowed from standard ionospheric physics.

entries.prediction: North Magnetic Pole drift: poleward motion dominates lateral motion
entries.outcome: Dome's own weekly test found lateral motion 5.5× larger than poleward — the opposite of the prediction
entries.what_actually_happened: Prediction failed. Dome called it 'refined' rather than falsified.

entries.outcome: Prediction did not match data. Changed after failing.
entries.what_actually_happened: Prediction failed. Dome changed the prediction after the fact and called it 'refined'.

entries.prediction: Moon angular diameter variation >2% between moonrise and transit
entries.outcome: Dome's own H(r) curve produces incorrect values for this prediction. Test suspended.
entries.what_actually_happened: Prediction can't work under the dome's own geometry. Rather than count it as failed, the dome suspended the test indefinitely.
